paper.title: Strengthening ChatGPT’s responses in sensitive conversations
paper.abstract: OpenAI collaborated with 170+ mental health experts to improve ChatGPT’s ability to recognize distress, respond empathetically, and guide users toward real-world support—reducing unsafe responses by up to 80%. Learn how we’re making ChatGPT safer and more supportive in sensitive moments.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
